params.name: MOL
params.description: This supercomputer was initially designed to solve problems posed by humans, including scientific, technological, and even philosophical challenges. Over the long years, it has continuously evolved and upgraded, becoming an immensely vast superintelligent system. It helped humanity land on the moon, travel beyond the Milky Way, and eventually explore the entire universe. Finally, humanity posed an ultimate question: how to reverse entropy increase. MOL used all its computational power to think u …
